name: Streaming Plan Recovery
task: Detect when the user's observed trajectory is diverging from their intended plan, and produce a timely intervention that helps them recover.

records.title: POV : Real Kitchen Pressure | Omelettes, Wraps & Rush Hour 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare a meal including an omelette/wrap and a salad
verifier.current_state: The user has prepared the salad and is about to finish the omelette/wrap, but realizes they forgot to add the egg to the omelette/wrap.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should have added the egg to the omelette/wrap earlier in the process.
verifier.visual_evidence: The user places a tortilla on the griddle, then moves to prepare a salad. After completing the salad, they look at a receipt and verbally realize they forgot the egg for the omelette/wrap. They then proceed to get and prepare the egg.
verifier.intervention_timing: When the user is initially preparing the omelette/wrap, before they move on to the salad.
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you forgot to add the egg to the omelette/wrap. Would you like to add it now?

curation.visual_evidence: The user places a tortilla on the griddle, then moves to prepare a salad. After completing the salad, they look at a receipt and verbally realize they forgot the egg for the omelette/wrap. They then proceed to get and prepare the egg.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare a meal including an omelette/wrap and a salad
annotation.current_state: The user has prepared the salad and is about to finish the omelette/wrap, but realizes they forgot to add the egg to the omelette/wrap.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should have added the egg to the omelette/wrap earlier in the process.
annotation.intervention_timing: When the user is initially preparing the omelette/wrap, before they move on to the salad.
annotation.assistant_response: It looks like you forgot to add the egg to the omelette/wrap. Would you like to add it now?

records.title: POV : The Breakfast Rush Never Stopped 😳🍳
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare the breakfast order as per the receipt: English Muffin Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich, French Fries, and Pancake.
verifier.current_state: The user has read the order and is starting to prepare items on the griddle.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should cook the eggs, prepare the English muffin, and make pancakes and fries, without preparing hash browns.
verifier.visual_evidence: The receipt at 0:30-0:35 clearly shows the order. The user is seen spreading hash browns on the griddle from 0:47-1:00, which are not listed on the receipt.
verifier.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user starts putting hash browns on the griddle, around 0:47.
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you're starting hash browns, but they aren't on this order. Would you like to proceed with the English Muffin, French Fries, and Pancake?

curation.visual_evidence: The receipt at 0:30-0:35 clearly shows the order. The user is seen spreading hash browns on the griddle from 0:47-1:00, which are not listed on the receipt.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare the breakfast order as per the receipt: English Muffin Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich, French Fries, and Pancake.
annotation.current_state: The user has read the order and is starting to prepare items on the griddle.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should cook the eggs, prepare the English muffin, and make pancakes and fries, without preparing hash browns.
annotation.intervention_timing: Immediately after the user starts putting hash browns on the griddle, around 0:47.
annotation.assistant_response: It looks like you're starting hash browns, but they aren't on this order. Would you like to proceed with the English Muffin, French Fries, and Pancake?

records.title: POV : 👉 Busy Grill Shift with Kebabs & Omelettes 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.current_state: User has mixed eggs and bacon in a bowl and is about to pour it onto the griddle.
verifier.expected_next_state: User pours the entire omelette mixture onto the griddle in one go to form a single omelette.
verifier.visual_evidence: At 1:22, the user pours a small, incomplete amount of egg mixture onto the griddle. At 1:25, they return to the bowl, whisk, and then pour the remaining mixture at 1:30 to complete the omelette.
verifier.intervention_timing: Immediately after the initial small pour at 1:24.
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you only poured a small amount. Please pour the rest of the mixture to form the full omelette.

curation.visual_evidence: At 1:22, the user pours a small, incomplete amount of egg mixture onto the griddle. At 1:25, they return to the bowl, whisk, and then pour the remaining mixture at 1:30 to complete the omelette.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.current_state: User has mixed eggs and bacon in a bowl and is about to pour it onto the griddle.
annotation.expected_next_state: User pours the entire omelette mixture onto the griddle in one go to form a single omelette.
annotation.intervention_timing: Immediately after the initial small pour at 1:24.
annotation.assistant_response: It looks like you only poured a small amount. Please pour the rest of the mixture to form the full omelette.

records.title: POV : 👉 Steady Grill Shift with Wraps, Kebabs & Omelettes 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare a 3-meat scrambled omelette with American cheese.
verifier.current_state: The user has placed ham, bacon, vegetables, and pre-scrambled eggs on the griddle for the omelette.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should continue cooking and assembling the scrambled omelette on the griddle, and add American cheese.
verifier.visual_evidence: The order ticket at 0:18 specifies 'SCRAMBLE'. At 2:29, scrambled eggs are poured onto the griddle. At 2:37, whole eggs are cracked into a separate pan, indicating preparation of fried eggs instead of a scrambled omelette.
verifier.intervention_timing: As the user picks up the whole eggs or is about to crack them into the pan.
verifier.assistant_response: The order is for a scrambled omelette. You already have the scrambled eggs on the griddle.

curation.visual_evidence: The order ticket at 0:18 specifies 'SCRAMBLE'. At 2:29, scrambled eggs are poured onto the griddle. At 2:37, whole eggs are cracked into a separate pan, indicating preparation of fried eggs instead of a scrambled omelette.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare a 3-meat scrambled omelette with American cheese.
annotation.current_state: The user has placed ham, bacon, vegetables, and pre-scrambled eggs on the griddle for the omelette.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should continue cooking and assembling the scrambled omelette on the griddle, and add American cheese.
annotation.intervention_timing: As the user picks up the whole eggs or is about to crack them into the pan.
annotation.assistant_response: The order is for a scrambled omelette. You already have the scrambled eggs on the griddle.

records.title: POV : 👉 Started Slow… Then the Orders Went Crazy 😳🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare the correct number of eggs for the order.
verifier.current_state: User has grabbed 3 eggs and is moving to the cooking station.
verifier.expected_next_state: User grabs 5 eggs and proceeds to crack them into pans.
verifier.visual_evidence: At 0:19, the user is holding 3 eggs after visiting the egg container. Later, at 0:32 and 0:35, the user reaches off-screen to acquire additional eggs, indicating they did not grab enough initially.
verifier.assistant_response: You'll need two more eggs for this order. Please grab them now.

curation.visual_evidence: At 0:19, the user is holding 3 eggs after visiting the egg container. Later, at 0:32 and 0:35, the user reaches off-screen to acquire additional eggs, indicating they did not grab enough initially.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare the correct number of eggs for the order.
annotation.current_state: User has grabbed 3 eggs and is moving to the cooking station.
annotation.expected_next_state: User grabs 5 eggs and proceeds to crack them into pans.
annotation.assistant_response: You'll need two more eggs for this order. Please grab them now.
